subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Lahih (Tablet to the Hague)
subcodes.first_line: O ye esteemed ones who are pioneers among the well-wishers of the world
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اول اشخاص خیرخواه محترم عالم انسانی نامه های شما که درین مدت حرب ارسال
subcodes.subjects: @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @war and peace, @unity in diversity, @universal peace; world unity, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @religion as source of love and unity, @unity; oneness of humanity
